no: Ports the Baldur's Gate II PC voicesets to Enhanced Edition 2.6+ as selectable player character soundsets. Includes 9 sets: 4 female and 5 male personalities.
sum: Baldur's Gate Voice Pack for Infinity Engine Enhanced Edition games version 2.6 and above.

co.n: Baldur's Gate II Voice Pack for EE 2.6+
co.tp2n: Baldur's Gate II Voice Pack for EE 2.6+
